betterquesting:10.desc:8:
§6Semiconductor Engineering: Elite Processor§f

§aThe Elite Processor is the brain of every QMD endgame machine!§f
The §bElite Processor§f (`qmd:semiconductor:6`) is the top-tier QMD logic chip, used to craft endgame controllers — antimatter launchers, gluon guns, lepton cannons, decelerators, mass spectrometers, and the §bAccelerator Laser Ion Source§f.

§6Recipe (QMDRecipes.java:505)§f:
Per `NCRecipes.assembler.addRecipe(...)`:
- Output: §b1 × Elite Processor§f (`qmd:semiconductor:6`)
- Input 1: §bAdvanced Processor§f (`qmd:semiconductor:5`, 1 unit)
- Input 2: §bBSCCO Wire§f (`wireBSCCO`, 4 units)
- Input 3: §bHafnium Oxide Dust§f (`qmd:chemical_dust:5`, 1 unit)
- Input 4: §bPlatinum Ingot§f (`thermalfoundation:material:134` / `qmd:ingot:10`, 1 unit)
- Time: 1 RF/t baseline, Power: 1 RF/t

§6Component Supply Chain§f:
- §bAdvanced Processor§f → requires §bBasic Processor§f + Redstone + §bHafnium Oxide§f + §bP-Type Doped Silicon§f (QMDRecipes.java:504)
- §bBSCCO Wire§f → from §bBSCCO Dust§f + Silver Ingot via HBM Assembly Machine (QMDRecipes.java:494)
- §bHafnium Oxide§f (`qmd:chemical_dust:5`) → byproduct of the §bOre Leacher§f processing Hafnium-bearing ore
- §bPlatinum Ingot§f → from §bSheldonite Ore§f or §bPlatinum Dust§f processing

§6Direct Descendants (graph-confirmed)§f:
The Elite Processor is consumed in these crafting recipes:
- §bLepton Cannon§f (`qmd:lepton_cannon`)
- §bGluon Gun§f (`qmd:gluon_gun`)
- §bAntimatter Launcher§f (`qmd:antimatter_launcher`)
- §bDecelerator Controller§f (`qmd:decelerator_controller`)
- §bMass Spectrometer Controller§f (`qmd:mass_spectrometer_controller`)
- §bAccelerator Laser Ion Source§f (`qmd:accelerator_laser_ion_source`)

§cWarning§f: You cannot skip the Advanced Processor tier — the Elite Processor recipe explicitly requires a §cAdvanced Processor§f as one of its four inputs. P-Type Doped Silicon (for the Advanced Processor) is not produced by an assembler — you must have a working §bTarget Chamber§f to manufacture it.

§eTip§f: Scale up your §bBSCCO Wire§f and §bPlatinum Ingot§f production before you commit to mass-producing Elite Processors. Both materials are bottlenecks in late-game QMD — the BSCCO assembly chain in particular competes for Bismuth, Strontium, and Silver with other late-game recipes.
